## Summary

Describe the problem and the behavior change.

## Validation

List the commands you ran, for example:

- `go build ./...`
- `go test -race ./...`
- `make verify`

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Docs updated if user-visible behavior, setup, configuration, or task format changed
- [ ] `make verify` passes locally
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)

## Notes

Call out any follow-up work, limitations, or reviewer context.
